In rerun::external::eframe::egui::widgets::color_picker

rerun::external::eframe::egui::widgets::color_picker

Function color_picker_color32

pub fn color_picker_color32(
    ui: &mut Ui,
    srgba: &mut Color32,
    alpha: Alpha,
) -> bool
Expand description

Shows a color picker where the user can change the given Color32 color.

Returns true on change.
